scripts.deploy: bash -c 'set -e && N=$(( $(cat deploy-counter.txt) + 1 )) && npm run build && grep -q __DEPLOY_COUNTER__ dist/index.js || { echo "ERROR: __DEPLOY_COUNTER__ not found in dist/index.js"; exit 1; } && grep -q __DEPLOY_COUNTER__ sw.js || { echo "ERROR: __DEPLOY_COUNTER__ not found in sw.js"; exit 1; } && STAGE=$(mktemp -d) && trap "rm -rf $STAGE" EXIT && cp -R dist "$STAGE/dist" && cp -R assets "$STAGE/assets" && cp sw.js index.html manifest.json theme.css index.css "$STAGE/" && sed -i "" "s/__DEPLOY_COUNTER__/$N/g" "$STAGE/dist/index.js" && sed -i "" "s/__DEPLOY_COUNTER__/$N/g" "$STAGE/sw.js" && chmod -R a+rX "$STAGE" && rsync --recursive --times --compress --progress --delete --perms --chmod=Du=rwx,Dgo=rx,Fu=rw,Fgo=r --rsync-path="mkdir -p /mnt/disks/pod7disk/www/untome/oneplay/music && rsync" "$STAGE/" lu@unto.me:/mnt/disks/pod7disk/www/untome/oneplay/music && echo $N > deploy-counter.txt'
scripts.test:unit: rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.unit.json && node --test dist-test/test/unit/*.test.js
